nasb.text: Then the lot for the sons of Joseph went from the Jordan at Jericho to the waters of Jericho on the east into the wilderness, going up from Jericho through the hill country to Bethel.

esv.text: The allotment of the people of Joseph went from the Jordan by Jericho, east of the waters of Jericho, into the wilderness, going up from Jericho into the hill country to Bethel.

cnv.text: 約瑟的子孫抽籤所得的地業，是從靠近耶利哥的約旦河起，到耶利哥東邊的水泉，經過從耶利哥上去的曠野，進到在山地的伯特利；

ccb.text: 约瑟的子孙抽签所得的地方是从耶利哥附近的约旦河，就是耶利哥水泉的东面开始，穿过旷野，直到伯特利山区；
